Ultravision  

Description

1: Ultravision

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 55 Skill: Divination
Casting Time: 5 Recast Time: 1.5
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Range: 100
Location: Any Time of Day: Any
Fizzle Adj: 25 Deletable: Yes
Blockable: Yes Focusable: Yes
Dispellable: Yes Interruptable: Yes
Short Buff Box: No Target Type: Single
Spell Type: Beneficial Source: Live 12/03

Messages

Cast on you: Your eyes tingle.
Cast on other: Soandso 's eyes glow violet.
Effect Fades: Your ultravision fades.

Game Description

Provides vastly improved night vision.

Items with this effect

  • 10 Dose Potion of Fleeting Languor
  • 10 Dose Potion of Gnomish Boils
  • 5 Dose Potion of Fleeting Languor
  • 5 Dose Potion of Gnomish Boils
  • Amulet of the Sphinx Eye
  • Apatite of Minor Sight
  • Benefit: Ultravision
  • Bloodflow of Minor Sight
  • Boneflow of Minor Sight
  • Brilliant Apatite of Minor Sight

Sold in the Abysmal Sea
QuoteReply
# Mar 27 2006 at 10:44 PM Rating: Decent
dafdaf
View User Forum
Scholar
1,273 posts
This spell is sold in the Abysmal Sea by the common spells merchent barbarian male called Godain MacKodor, located at -15, -150, 100. You can find him using the Find command too.
▲ Page top
??
QuoteReply
# Apr 28 2003 at 12:32 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591784254458
124 posts
WTF does this spell do can you see in the dark with it. made a frog and they have ultravision all the time. dont think it helps to much in the dark cause it gets pretty dark with a frog rather then a high elf i have that when the sun goes down it makes do difference. just wondering thanks
▲ Page top
RE: ??
QuoteReply
# Apr 28 2003 at 12:43 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592245745802
View User Forum
Sage
950 posts
High Elves, Wood Elves, and Half Elves have Infravision. Dark Elves, Gnomes, and Dwarves have Ultravision. Humans, Barbarians, and Erudites are night blind. It sounds like Frogloks are night blind from what you've said. I'm not sure about Iksar or Vah Shir.

Infravision has a reddish cast and helps you see some at night, especially players and MoBs. However my half-elf would get lost int he tunnel to Surefall Glade, because he could only see himself or people who ran by, not the walls.

Ultravision has a purplish cast and helps you see MUCH better, you can see walls and things.
▲ Page top
RE: ??
QuoteReply
# Jul 26 2003 at 2:02 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592257278576
Scholar
53 posts
Erduties/Barbs/Humans are night blind
DEs/Frogs have ultra vision
Everything else has infravision

Infravision partaily removes "light fog" and tints the screen red to make it easier to see moving things

Ultra vision tints the screen purple and removes the light fog all together.

Edited, Tue Sep 30 15:58:06 2003
▲ Page top
RE: ??
QuoteReply
# Mar 12 2004 at 8:01 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592258035378
57 posts
if u have ultravision can u see invis also?
▲ Page top
RE: ??
QuoteReply
# Mar 18 2004 at 4:37 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1704672973637
Guru
5,311 posts
No. See invis is a separate ability.

Infravision = allows you to see light in the infa red range of the spectrum (which should explain the reddish tint.)

Ultravision = allows you to see light in the ultra violet range of the spectrum (which explains the violet tint.)
▲ Page top
RE: ??
QuoteReply
# Jan 10 2005 at 2:32 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591802300066
6 posts
ifravision as it was used in D&D and I believe EQ means they see variations in heat..thus the red tint

ultra is similiar to "nightvision" as we know it today
▲ Page top

__DEL__1591782866926
11 posts
Anyone know where the beastlord version is? It won't let you scribe the Enchanter one. I have looked and looked and can't find it. Any help would be appreciated.
▲ Page top
RE: Beastlord Version?
QuoteReply
# Feb 23 2003 at 6:43 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591782866926
11 posts
Ok finally found the Beastlord version. It can only be purchased in Oasis from the gypsies. I was hunting crocs with my druid and I just stopped by to see if it was the one for Beastlords and sure enough it was. Only place that I have found it. Hope this helps someone.
▲ Page top
